meta.title: ped

source.publication: Section 4: Roots, Prefixes, Suffixes and Foreign Words (owner-supplied reference)
source.usage_note: Personal study only. Root, words and meanings transcribed faithfully from the source PDF; a small number of well-attested real words on the same root are included where the source list was too short to form a complete family (4 to 8 members). Parts, glosses, context sentences, mentor note, attempt and construct options are the teaching layer, authored for the Language Garden (LANGUAGE_GARDEN_BIBLE §10).

meta.reviewer_notes: Batch 2: transcribed from the owner's roots (Greek and Latin) reference; 2 taught, 2 reach.

root.label: ped
root.mentor_note: this ped means child; a different Latin ped, met elsewhere, means foot, and the two are easy to confuse.

attempt.direction_prompt: A doctor who treats adults only, or one who treats children?

context_sentences: The pediatrician’s waiting room was decorated in bright colours, low shelves, and small chairs.
Their pediatrician had watched three generations of the same family grow up in that clinic.
The school’s new pedagogy replaced rote memorising with projects the students designed themselves.
Her thesis compared pedagogy across three countries, each with a completely different idea of what school is for.
Her research in pedology tracked how children’s reasoning changes between the ages of five and ten.
The institute’s pedology programme had followed the same group of children since infancy.

construct_options.text: The study of how children develop physically and mentally
The study of soil composition and rock layers
The study of ageing and the elderly

context_sentences: The clinic added a pedodontics wing after realising how many young patients it was turning away.
A career in pedodontics meant learning to calm a frightened five year old before the drill ever started.

construct_options.text: The branch of dentistry focused on the dental care of children
The study of foot and ankle disorders in children
The branch of dentistry focused on the elderly
